mapper.select: /* InventoryDeadlineMapper.selectInventoryQty 재고정보 조회 */ WITH OB AS ( SELECT OD.CTKEY , OD.OWKEY , OD.ICKEY , SUM(OD.EXPCTQTY) AS OBEXPCTQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OD.ALQTY = 0 AND OD.OBDTSTATUSCD = '00' AND SUBSTR(OH.OBHDDAY,1,8) BETWEEN TO_CHAR((CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + (-1) * INTERVAL '1 month'),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + INTERVAL '5 days','YYYYMMDD') GROUP BY OD.CTKEY, OD.OWKEY, OD.ICKEY ), ORD AS ( SELECT T.OWKEY , T.ICKEY , T.OBEXPCTQTY FROM ( SELECT SD.OWKEY , SD.ICKEY , SUM(SD.INITQTY) AS OBEXPCTQTY FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON SH.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND SH.SOHDKEY = SD.SOHDKEY WHERE SH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND SUBSTR(SH.DLVYEXPCTDAY,1,8) BETWEEN TO_CHAR((CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + (-1) * INTERVAL '1 month'),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + INTERVAL '5 days','YYYYMMDD') AND SD.WKSTATUS IN ('00','15') /* 작업생성, 분배오류 */ AND SH.ORDERTYPECD IN ('90','100') GROUP BY SD.OWKEY , SD.ICKEY ) T WHERE T.OBEXPCTQTY > 0 ) SELECT IV.OWKEY /* 화주코드 */ , IV.ICKEY /* 상품코드 */ , IV.TOTQTY AS AVQTY /* 가용수량 */ , COALESCE(OB.OBEXPCTQTY, 0) + COALESCE(ORD.OBEXPCTQTY, 0) + COALESCE(IV.ALQTY, 0) AS OBEXPCTQTY /* 출고예정수량 */ FROM ( SELECT IVLC.CTKEY , IVLC.OWKEY , IVLC.ICKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN ( IC.EXPCKYN = 'N' OR (IC.EXPCKYN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(IVAT.EXPDATE,1,8),'YYYYMMDD') - IC.EXPCNVRSNDAYS + ROUND((IC.EXPCNVRSNDAYS * (OBIMPSCRITRT/100)),0),'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDD'))) THEN IVLC.TOTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS TOTQTY , SUM(CASE WHEN ( IC.EXPCKYN = 'N' OR (IC.EXPCKYN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(IVAT.EXPDATE,1,8),'YYYYMMDD') - IC.EXPCNVRSNDAYS + ROUND((IC.EXPCNVRSNDAYS * (OBIMPSCRITRT/100)),0),'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDD'))) THEN IVLC.AVQTY ELSE 0 END) AS AVQTY , SUM(CASE WHEN ( IC.EXPCKYN = 'N' OR (IC.EXPCKYN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(IVAT.EXPDATE,1,8),'YYYYMMDD') - IC.EXPCNVRSNDAYS + ROUND((IC.EXPCNVRSNDAYS * (OBIMPSCRITRT/100)),0),'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDD'))) THEN IVLC.ALQTY ELSE 0 END) AS ALQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLC IVLC INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC LC ON IVLC.CTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND IVLC.LCKEY = LC.LCKEY AND LC.LCTYPECD = '90' /* 로케이션유형코드 - 보관 */ INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ZN ZN ON LC.CTKEY = ZN.CTKEY AND LC.ZNKEY = ZN.ZNKEY AND ZN.ZNTYPECD = '10' /* 존유형코드 - 보관존 */ INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT IVAT ON IVLC.CTKEY = IVAT.CTKEY AND IVLC.OWKEY = IVAT.OWKEY AND IVLC.IVATKEY = IVAT.IVATKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON IVLC.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND IVLC.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND IVLC.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY WHERE IVLC.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND IVLC.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IVLC.IVSTATUSCD = '10' /* 재고상태코드 - 정상 */ GROUP BY IVLC.CTKEY , IVLC.OWKEY , IVLC.ICKEY ) IV LEFT OUTER JOIN OB ON IV.CTKEY = OB.CTKEY AND IV.OWKEY = OB.OWKEY AND IV.ICKEY = OB.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN ORD ON IV.OWKEY = ORD.OWKEY AND IV.ICKEY = ORD.ICKEY
